title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Cuemath Advisory Limited in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath Advisory Limited:
Cuemath Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
